segment-text: BLOOD SHY
Scot Beidelman
OVER BLACK - A door bell CHIMES, then an urgent KNOCK KNOCK.
INT. DUKE RESIDENCE, FOYER - NIGHT

KYLE (26) looks every inch the hardcore punk rocker he wishes he was, down to his bug-eyed pallor and tattoos. Right now he holds bloody gauze to his bare chest and hustles to answer the door in a house financed with three gold records. He opens the door for two Paramedics. Lean MARCUS (39) with wire-hanger shoulders is swift but pro, like an army field medic working for a living. His partner, beefy SEBASTIAN (46) is Florence Nightingale in a linebacker's body.
You guys got here fast.
Glad you think so. Have a seat, let's have a look. Not me.
She's in the bathroom.
INT. BATHROOM - NIGHT

NIKKI (24) spurns Avril Lavigne for being a hack but steals her look anyway. Usually she's a mosh pit catcall, but tonight she's unconscious on the bathroom floor, pale and surrounded by blood smears and rags. Kyle leads the EMTs in. Marcus kneels beside her.
She passed out, hit her head I think.
She bleeding?
Blood's mine. Kinda panicked, both of us.
What's her name? Nikki.
Nikki, my name's Marcus. I'm a paramedic. Look at me, honey.
Nikki starts to come to.
No no, just-
(trying to focus on Marcus) Who the fuck are you?
I called the paramedics, baby. I'm sorry.
(holding up two fingers) How many fingers am I holding up? NIKKI
Marcus cocks an eyebrow.
Earlier.
Two fingers of gin. Haven't heard that one in a while. How many? Martinis?
Couple, maybe. Shouldn't be drinking at all.
She pregnant?
(snagged) Um... no?
Okay honey, can you sit up?
Sebastian looks at Kyle's blood-smeared chest.
Let me look at that.
Not til I know she's okay.
Marcus tries to help Nikki sit up.
Look at me. Right here. (checking her eyes with a light) How do you feel?
(dazed) Where's Billy? Is he okay?
I'm right here. I'm fine.
We'll get to him.
My head... What happened?
I'd say you fainted and bumped your head. No signs of concussion. Probably just a bruise and a big ass headache.
I'm sorry, baby, I thought you were having a seizure, or a heart
attack, orNikki, still groggy, spots Kyle. He's not who she expected to see, but she tries to hide her surprise. Oh, right.
I was worried. I'm sorry. is all my fault.
Yeah I'm kinda curious about the prologue here.
Do you have to file a report?
Only if I want to keep my job.
I'm not good with blood. me woozy.
Makes
Makes you faint, apparently. Think you can stand up?
He helps her up, she stumbles. Kyle helps stabilize her.
There it is, all right.
What'd you say your name was?
I'm Marcus. That's Sebastian. You're gonna be fine. Just take it slow. Drink some water. A lot of water.
(re: Kyle's wound) You going to let me look at that now?
You're still bleeding?
Baby, I was more worried about you.
You'd rather bleed to death than have her sleep it off. Adorable. Come on, show time.
Kyle starts to peel back the gauze, but flinches.
It's stuck. Oh god.
NIKKI
Nikki teeters, Sebastian helps her settle on the floor.
How long's the gauze been there?
Supposed to be non-stick. Yeah.
Twenty minutes?
Maybe more. (gives it tug, flinches) Fuck! Goddamn, that's some pain! Yeah.
On it.
(to Sebastian)
(to Nikki) You good?
Nikki nods. Sebastian exits. Kyle plucks at the gauze.
Holy shit, man, that fucking hurts. Worse than when it happened.
Yeah, the blood started to coagulate in the fibers of the
gauze, like early scab tissue.
ON SEBASTIAN. Passing the KITCHEN, he notices an 8-inch CHEF'S KNIFE on the floor, blood on the blade and spattered about. BACK TO BATHROOM.
Just like a band-aid, man, just gotta rip it off all at once.
Not just like a band-aid. wouldn't do that.
Just a quick rip, no big deal, right?
No, wait, I've seen people do
that and the pain is so badKyle yanks the gauze away with a GRUNT. A flare of pain lights up his face and he passes out cold.
-they pass out.
Blood streams from Kyle's chest.
Dumb son of a bitch.
THUD behind Marcus. Nikki fainted again. Sebastian returns with a kit, sees the aftermath.
He rip it off? Dumb son of a bitch.
They never listen. Salts?
Sebastian passes him the smelling salts.
Weapon's in the kitchen. Wild guess.
Chef's knife?
Looked like German steel, blackwood handle.
Thank you Emeril.
It's a nice knife. Wish I could afford one.
Come on kids, up and at 'em.
Kyle and Nikki sniff the salts, start to rouse.
Get her out of this bloodbath while I clean up Sid Vicious here.
Sebastian helps her up and out of the bathroom. Marcus cleans Kyle's wound.
Goddamn. I never passed out before. I mean, not from pain. Fuckin A.
That's a good slice. you stitched up.
Let's get
No hospitals.
It's deep. Keep it clean, covered, it might heal okay. But one mosh pit and you'll give your wife another reason to faint.
She's not(catches himself) I dunno. This is fucked up.
INT. LIVING ROOM - CONTINUOUS
Nikki sits. Sebastian looks around the room. Is he okay?
So what happened?
Oh, just an accident, you know. We were making dinner...
I don't want to be rude, but that knife is still on the floor in there, and I don't see so much as a sliced onion.
It's not what you think.
We see this stuff all the time.
We were making dinner.
Sebastian looks at THREE GOLD RECORDS framed on the wall.
Right. Are these what I think they are?
One engraving reads, "THE SHELL SHOCK / MISCREANT SLAMDANGO." Shell Shock?
The Shell Shock. Billy's the lead singer.
I don't listen to that punk shit.
Punk shit bought this house.
You in the band?
Just a groupie. Til I married the guy. You married?
Twenty years.
You get a purple heart for that?
You two gonna be okay after we leave? I can get a black and white here in five minutes. No cops.
It's not like that.
INT. BATHROOM - CONTINUOUS
Marcus inspects Kyle's freshly cleaned cut, sees a TATTOO on Kyle's chest that reads "THE SHELL SHOCK."
What's "The Shell Shock?" Punk band.
You don't know 'em?
My kid probably does. Not anymore. You a fan?
Your wife is short.
You got big ears. So what?
You're taller. That flap of skin, angle of the cut. She brought that knife down on you.
You maybe should mind your own business, Mr. Paramedic.
Mr. Paramedic has a legal obligation to report spousal abuse. No cops.
No hospitals, no cops. don't need me. Guess not. Guess you
Marcus gathers his things to leave.
Okay. But you might need this. Catch.
He tosses a roll of medical tape wide of Kyle. He stretches out to snatch it, but winces, and the cut bleeds rapidly. Fuck.
Asshole. Yeah.
Good luck with that.
Okay, okay, we can work this out.
What's to work out? You're draining like an oil pan. You need stitches or your dumb ass is gonna bleed to death the next time you tease your hair.
We just... No reports, no media. What if, you know, you just... do it yourself?
What, sew you up?
We got cash. Keep us off the grid. I mean, you know how, right? You got the tools?
We don't roll like that.
Nobody has to know. This hour of our lives never happened. Cash.
How much cash?
INT. KITCHEN - CONTINUOUS
Nikki starts into the kitchen but stops when she sees the knife and blood, suddenly light-headed. Whoa.
I can't...
You're doing fine.
As Nikki slowly bends to the knife, the back of her shirt rides up revealing BRUISES ON HER BACK. She can't bear to touch the knife, turns away from it. I can't.
I feel nauseous.
What was that on your back?
Nothing. (re: knife) Would you mind? What?
Would I mind cleaning up your crime scene? A little bit, yeah.
Kyle and Marcus enter.
Ain't a crime scene if nothing ain't reported to no cops.
Thanks, Hemingway.
Baby, I'm trying to clean up your mess here.
Great, go pick up the knife I stabbed you with.
Marcus and Sebastian shoot her a look.
-that I didn't stab you with.
Kyle gingerly kneels to the knife, puts it on the counter.
These fine gentlemen have agreed to make a deal. We have?
Wait a second.
They are going to help us, they are not going to tell anybody, and we are going to pay them. How much?
Yeah, how much?
Ten-... Ten thousand. Cash. (off her glare) It's worth it.
Is that what punk rock buys you?
It is if your name is Billy Duke.
What, that Shell Shock crap?
He's the lead singer.
So you burnout kids play shitty music for other burnout kids and make a hundred times what I get for saving lives. Yeah, I'll take your ten grand.
(to Nikki) No knife, no bruises, no paramedics, like this hour of our lives never happened.
(to Marcus) You'll squeal anyway.
You'll squeal back.
Ooh, he's got a point. it's all good.
See baby, Reluctantly, terribly, she nods her head.
Awesome. I'm super psyched to stop bleeding.
Cash up front. Wait here.
She goes down the hall.
Let's get the gear.
INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT
Kyle lies on the couch. Nikki drops a stack of CASH on the coffee table. Marcus and Sebastian not back yet.
Have you lost your fucking mind?
What I'm losing is blood, by, like, the quart.
You're such a drama queen.
You stabbed me!
Keep your voice down.
Chill out. We're payin' 'em to keep quiet.
Fuckin' we, you aren't paying anybody! That's Billy's goddamn money!
Yeah? Who gave you those bruises? Billy hits you but I get stabbed. Fuck you. that.
He wasn't always like
Don't take it out on me. It's not my fault you don't know who the father is.
Before Nikki can slap Kyle five kinds of purple, Marcus and Sebastian return with gear, see the cash.
How's my favorite patient? Pay or play.
Marcus cleans the wound.
Sebastian preps a syringe.
I can give you a shot for the pain, but I don't have the good stuff so it's gonna be touch and go.
It ain't gonna hurt much, right? Pussy.
(snapping at her) Put a cock in it!
(ignoring the crack) You'll feel a little pinch...
Marcus injects Kyle with the syringe.
Give it a minute. How long you two been married?
Oh, I don't know, what's it been, Snuggledump...?
About a thousand years.
Love conquers all, right?
Yeah, like Genghis Khan.
Under these conditions, it won't be that clean a scar. Punk rock.
(prodding the wound) Feel that? Kinda.
Marcus gestures to Sebastian, who preps another syringe. What's that?
Secret sauce.
You let us do our jobs and you'll be stage-diving in no time.
With his back to the group, Sebastian pulls a fast-food HOT SAUCE PACKET out of his shirt pocket, jabs it with the syringe, and draws from it. He hands the syringe to Marcus, who leans toward Kyle.
Wait, I just, I never had stitches before.
What happened to punk rock? Your anesthetic isn't taking, so I'm sending in reinforcements.
Okay, I'm gonna go throw up for a while.
She wobbles out of the room.
How far along is she?
Two or three months. found out.
I just
You hit her before or after you found out?
Hey, not cool, bro. never do that.
There's a whole lot going on in this house I don't understand.
For ten grand, you owe me a whole lotta not understanding.

Exactly. You got your reasons, and now we got ten thousand of our own to forget this hour of our lives. Whatever happens, never happened. I keep thinking about it, and I keep coming back to one thing.
Marcus inserts the needle into the wound. Deep.
Chick went into a room and pulled out ten grand in cash like she was getting her coat.
(feeling the needle) Ooh, ow, ow...
There it is. Okay. So. Bad news, my friend.
Kyle looks at Marcus anxiously, utterly vulnerable.
I need to tell you something, but you gotta relax for a minute. Stay still, now, calm. We good? Wait...
This isn't anesthetic.
Kyle squirms.
Shhh, still, okay? You really don't want to jostle me right now, all right? What?
Secret sauce is funny, but we didn't have burgers for dinner. Tacos. Well, I had tacos, Sebastian had a, a what?
An enchilarito.
So Sebastian here, he draws a syringe from a hot sauce packet.
Sebastian tosses the empty packet on the stack of cash.
Oh fuck...
Easy now. One slip and I squirt fire into this choice pulmonary vein I got here. Take about a second to blast into your heart. You know what that'll feel like?
What the hell, man?
Yeah, me neither. I haven't read any studies about shooting hot sauce into a human heart.
Nikki returns, shields her eyes.
I was really hoping you'd be done by now. Baby-
Shhh, shhh. (to Nikki) I was just giving your husband the prognosis.
Nikki sees the needle in Kyle's chest, feels his panic.
What is this?
I need to tell you something, but be cool, because if you freak out, I might make an ugly mistake. Got it?
Marcus fingers the syringe. Kyle sweats and twitches.
It's important -- very important, okay? -- that we all stay calm. Have a seat.
Nikki sits, nervously watches Kyle under the syringe.

I'm not going to pretend this isn't about money. It very much is. But I want you to know that we aren't bad people, me and Sebastian. We're just hardworking family guys in the red trying to make up for state cutbacks. Seems to me you got money to spare and your only debt is the effort you owe to earn what you already have, so we're gonna balance our books here.
What's in there?
A barrel full of Gimme All Your Money.
No. You have it already. everything.
A chick with ten grand just laying around the house has more than just ten grand laying around the house.
That was rainy day money. all there is.

Honey, there's a category five shitstorm about to make landfall in your living room. (to Kyle) How about you, Billy? Want to tell us where the piggy bank is, or do we make your heart explode in your chest?
He doesn't know where it is. (beat) Where we used to keep it.
See, there we go. Why don't you go for a little walk with

segment-speaker: Sebastian while Billy and I hang
segment-text: out here?
She turns, sees Sebastian standing behind her, gesturing with the bloody chef's knife like, Let's Go. Go. Go.
When you don't find anything, you'll go away. We'll see.
Nikki hesitantly leads Sebastian out of the living room.
So when this is over, you gonna stitch me up, right? Cause man, I gotta get something outta this, and this slot in my chest is starting to really upset me.
INT. HALLWAY - CONTINUOUS
Sebastian walks Nikki at knife point down the hall.
Stop pointing that thing at me. You're making me nervous.
You can't even see me.
I know you're pointing a fucking knife at my back and you're making me fucking nervous!
She stops at a closed door, opens it to darkness. Basement?
Think I'm stupid?
Yes, very, but the safe is in the basement, and we keep the money in the safe, so we're going in
the basement.
There a light switch?
Nikki flicks on a light.
INT. BASEMENT - CONTINUOUS
Nikki leads Sebastian downstairs to a small basement with a crappy steel desk, water heater, rotten old loveseat, dozens of music posters taped over the walls.
Behind the poster.
Ladies first.
She pulls down a Butthole Surfers poster revealing a SAFE. Sebastian gestures to the safe with the knife. deep breath, works the combination. CLICK. Nikki steps out of Sebastian's way.
Nuh uh. How do I know it isn't booby trapped?
Nikki fights to not hyperventilate. Nikki takes a Sebastian pokes her gently in the back with the knife.
And to think, just ten minutes ago, I gave a rat's ass about your safety.

Nikki opens the safe to STACKS OF CASH. Sebastian smiles. She reaches into the safe, into the shadows over the cash... And whips out a .357 MAGNUM REVOLVER, spins toward Sebastian, cocks it. It's a big gun for her little hand.
Drop the fucking knife or I'll, I'll blast your fucking head off!
Duchess, I've drained abscesses more threatening than you.
Unperturbed, Sebastian takes off his yellow EMT jacket.
What are you doing?
Take it easy. I just want to show you something.

Sebastian calmly slices his own arm with the knife. Blood runs down his arm, puddling on the floor. Nikki's eyes widen... And she faints dead away. gun FIRES into the wall. When her hand hits the ground, the
INT. LIVING ROOM - CONTINUOUS

The O.S. gun shot startles Kyle and Marcus. A split second's inventory assures that Marcus didn't accidentally inject Kyle, so Kyle seizes the moment and lunges, shoving Marcus and the syringe over the coffee table. Kyle grabs the biggest coffee table book you ever saw - "PUNK ROCK: ALL THE SHITTY PICTURES" - and CLOBBERS Marcus with it. Marcus hits the floor. Kyle pins him, hoists the book over his head to smash Marcus's skull, whenAnother GUN SHOT, this one in the room. Kyle turns to see Sebastian with the gun pointed at him, a HOLE in the ceiling above him, and a limp Nikki and his EMT jacket slung over his shoulder. Kyle drops the book. jacket on the floor. Sebastian flops both Nikki and the
You all right?
I'm bleeding again.
Sebastian SHOOTS the floor next to Kyle.
Not you, asshole.
Jesus, where'd you get a gun?
Chick thought she was clever, pulled it from the safe. Is she...
Just passed out.
He displays his slashed arm. Hefts the pistol.
Damn, haven't held one of these in a while.
Sebastian BLASTS one of the framed gold records to bits.
You want somebody to
Marcus applies a large bandage to Sebastian's wound.
These two are so punked out, they probably wake the neighbors when
they brush their teeth.
Find the money?
Gonna need a bag for all that cash.
Marcus regards the surrounding punk decadence.
Why stop there? (to Kyle) Where do you keep the duct tape?
I don't know.
Sebastian puts the barrel of the gun in Kyle's face.
The fuck you don't.
I don't know! I don't know.
Well, where's the tools and shit?
Fuck man, I don't know!
How does the man of the house not know where the fucking tools are?
We don't have any duct tape.
Nikki sits up, ragged. Sebastian is dumbfounded.
Who... doesn't have... duct tape?
What do I need duct tape for?
It's got a thousand uses! Everybody needs duct tape!
Now you know what to get me for Christmas.
Okay, shut up, everybody. (to Kyle and Nikki) Do you have any restraining materials similar to but not precisely duct tape? Rope, maybe? Fishing line?
Maybe in the garage?
(brightening) Fuck the garage.
Sebastian wraps Nikki and Kyle together standing back-to-back with surgical tubing from a spool, like a double mummy.
Goddamn, this is some tight shit.

Marcus ties it off, leaving Kyle and Nikki tottering precariously on bunched feet. Sebastian eyes Nikki. Nikki spits in his face. He gives her a light shove. falls backward, Kyle slams face first into the floor.
Hold that thought.
Marcus and Sebastian head down the hall.
Master bedroom? That way.
I got the safe.
They split up. ON NIKKI AND KYLE. They can hear rummaging O.S.
I'm sorry... Baby, I'm sorry. Stop.
KYLE
Stop! Stop fucking talking! Your goddamn mouth got us into this.
My mouth didn't stab me in the chest!
And goodbye apology.
Well did you really think I'd just be like, sure, whatever? (MORE)

Sure, raise my kid with that wifebeating prick. Why the hell not, right? He's taken everything else away from me. And now I'm gonna die. I'm gonna fucking die as a fucking roadie for Billy's band, which I fucking cofounded, tied up to the girl Billy stole from me, in Billy's house, surrounded by bits of Billy's gold fucking record.
Get it all out? Feel better?
Just tell me one thing. If it was up to you, who the father is, who would you pick? Me or him?
Nikki sees the shards of the shattered gold record, frame, and glass on the floor nearby.
Roll with me.
I have an idea. My direction, over the top of me, okay?
Kyle heaves his weight up, and they roll a couple times toward the shards.

Wiggle up a bit, like a worm. They inch into position. Nikki rubs against a large jagged shard, scraping one section of tubing. From here, Kyle has a clear view down the hall. Nikki scrapes. One tube snaps. She thrashes, but the tubes don't budge. She accidently BUMPS the coffee table. As if in reaction, the rummaging sounds stop. Not good. She scrapes faster.
More tubes snap.
Okay, got it, done, out!
They wiggle loose and shed the tubes. to cut the tubes binding their feet. Freedom. Nikki uses the shard Kyle grabs Nikki, spins her to face him.
I love you Nikki.
I love you Kyle.
Sebastian comes around the corner, sees them free.
What the fuck!

Kyle BELLOWS and launches himself at Sebastian. Sebastian raises the gun, Kyle knocks it aside and slams him against the wall. The revolver skitters away. Nikki snatches it. Marcus rounds the corner, grabs at Nikki's gun hand. But his own hand partially covers the barrel. BOOM! Blood sprays from Marcus's hand. into the other room. He YELPS, staggers Nikki stumbles from the kick of the gun, drops it. Kyle swipes it, whirls on Sebastian rushing up. Fires, BOOM! Misses. Sebastian stops cold, throws his hands up defensively, but Kyle is all adrenaline and... BOOM! Misses again. The bullet drills Sebastian's forehead, torques his neck back, tosses his body backward out of the hallway... ...into the Living Room, hits the hardwood floor flat-backed like a thunderclap. ...just as Marcus comes back, chef's knife in hand. Sebastian's body in front of him, blood pooling beneath. drops the knife with a CLATTER and bolts. Kyle hears the front door SLAM SHUT. He
EXT. DUKE RESIDENCE - NIGHT
Shirtless, bleeding Kyle runs out across the lush lawn, gun in hand, but the ambulance PEELS OUT and takes off.
INT. DINING ROOM - CONTINUOUS

Dining Room is just off the Living Room. Nikki sits at the table, struggling to keep her shit together. Kyle steps over Sebastian's body, sits by Nikki, sets the gun on the table. They share a stunned silence, dazedly regaining rationality.
You look good.
Where do we go?
Like you're okay.
Right?
To take him, I mean.
I think.
There's a difference.
We can't report it.
Between killed and murdered, a big fucking difference.
How am I going to explain this?
He'll report something, but it won't be this.
Billy's gonna lose his shit.
Tied up, back to back. couldn't see you.
Hell of a shot.
If I have to go, I want to be looking at you.
The gold record, oh, Billy's gonna be pissed.
Fuck him. We'll figure it out, some kinda story, burglar something, for Billy.
He won't want cops either.
(leaning in close) I'd do it again. For you. Anything for you. For us, and for the kid. I know.
I just want us to be us.
He kisses her neck gently.
You're bleeding.
I'm clotting.

He sidles up to her lips to make amends, and she lets him. They look into each other's eyes, struggling whether to scream or whisper. He kisses her hard, clasps her hands in his against the overpriced wood. Abruptly, she yanks her left hand away, suddenly freaked. She twists, and bolts out of the room. Kyle sighs and hangs his head.
INT. MASTER BEDROOM - CONTINUOUS
The bedroom has been tossed like a Cobb salad. Kyle enters to find Nikki frantically groping through the aftermath. No no no...
What are you looking for?
They're gone! They fucking took 'em!
What's gone, baby?
My rings! (pointing to a dresser) They were right there!
We'll get you new rings.
My wedding ring, you asshole! And my engagement ring! I always take them off when I'm with you. You probably never even noticed, did you, you fuck?
But come on, do they really mean that much to you anymore?
She wavers, stunned by her own inability to answer that.
Just tell him they took 'em in
The robbery that happened when my secret lover called 911 after I stabbed him cause he was gonna rat us out to force a paternity test? That fucking robbery?! Well...
He'll know. I can lie about everything else, but when he asks me where my rings are... Doesn't matter what I say. He'll know.
Okay, okay... Fuck all this. Let's just go. Just leave. Right now.
It's not that easy.
It's exactly that easy. you, you love me. I know.
We get in the car and we just go. Just drive. Raise the kid.
What if it's Billy's?
Then we save the kid.
How would we get by?
There's jobs... Jobs.
There's nothing out there.
But Billy's a cash cow?
He's Billy Duke. You're just you.
Kyle deflates.
I need you both. Billy's my anchor, but you're my rock.
What does that even mean?
I have to think about what's best for the kid. I can't leave. I need to stay here, and I need to figure out how to survive Billy coming home.
This is fucked up. What if it's my kid? What if we're, like, parents? Guess we're supposed to be, I dunno, not selfish, or something.
Or something.
Okay. Promise me. You really will do what's best for the kid. Of course. Promise.
At any cost. I promise.
KYLE
Kyle reaches for a shirt among the disarray.
That's Billy's shirt.
He shrugs it on anyway, tugs on his shoes, and walks out.
Where are you going?
I'm gonna get your rings back.
INT. HALLWAY - CONTINUOUS
She follows him down the hall.
You can't be serious.
If this is what it takes to keep us together, I'm all over it. (steps over Sebastian's body) We'll take care of him when I get back.
Billy's flight lands at six.
So we have til dawn. I get your rings back, we have all night to put this place back together. The way we were.
He grabs the yellow EMT jacket from the floor and enters the:
INT. DINING ROOM - CONTINUOUS
Kyle takes the gun from the table.
Don't think he'll go to the hospital. They gotta report gunshots.
I can't go with you. killer. I'm not a
But I am? Don't think of me like that. I did it for you, for us.
Kyle checks the cylinder. JUST ONE BULLET left.
That's Billy's gun.
Billy got any more bullets?
They were in the safe.
Of course they were. Look, I know Billy has a lot over me... Don't-
But he wants the world. The only thing I want is for you to be happy. But you probably never noticed, did you, you fuck?
He kisses her. She touches his cheek.
What are you going to do?
Whatever it takes.
And he walks out. O.S., the front door slams shut.
INT. KYLE'S CAR, MOVING - NIGHT
Kyle checks the LED clock on his dashboard.
INT. BASEMENT - NIGHT
Nikki sits by the open, empty safe. Desk drawers strewn about. She numbly starts reloading the drawers.
INT. MASTER BEDROOM - NIGHT
She picks up the aftermath.
INT. HALLWAY - CONTINUOUS

She enters the bloody hallway, steps on something - CRUNCH. Marcus's SEVERED PINKY FINGER, blown off in the gun blast. She gasps, shrinks against the wall, slides to the floor. But then something else catches her eye. A few feet away... Marcus's SEVERED RING FINGER... ...with his WEDDING BAND near the bloody stump. And finally, it all sinks in. She cracks. Whimpering, then bawling. in exasperation. She pounds the floor She scrubs the blood off the hardwood floor with soap and water, scrubbing around the finger. She scrubs blood spray off the hallway walls. Steps over and around Sebastian's body, wipes blood spatter off furniture, framed pictures, knickknacks. As she wipes blood from the wall opposite the hallway, she finds a nick in the wall. A hole. She peers through, sees light on the other side. She looks down -- for the first time -- at Sebastian's punctured skull.
EXT. ELEMENTARY SCHOOL - NIGHT
Kyle pulls up to an elementary school, hops out, runs up to a row of classrooms, PULLS THE FIRE ALARM. BELLS HOLLER.
INT. KYLE'S CAR, MOVING - NIGHT
FIRE ENGINES ROAR past Kyle the opposite direction, toward the school. He watches them in his rearview mirror.
INT. DINING ROOM - NIGHT

Adjacent to the Living Room... Nikki looks at the hole in the shared wall. Looks across the room to the opposite wall - another hole. She uses a small knife to dig into it. Pulls out the SLUG that bored through Sebastian's skull.
